mapper.select: SELECT * FROM organization WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY level, display_order
SELECT * FROM organization WHERE parent_id IS NULL AND is_active = true ORDER BY display_order
SELECT * FROM organization WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND is_active = true ORDER BY display_order
SELECT * FROM organization WHERE org_type = #{orgType} AND is_active = true ORDER BY level, display_order
mapper.update: UPDATE organization SET name = #{name}, code = #{code}, description = #{description}, parent_id = #{parentId}, org_type = #{orgType}, level = #{level}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id}
